title: Test runners, 100% coverage config, Docker/compose for integration and E2E
description: Add unit and integration test tooling (e.g. Vitest + coverage provider or repo standard), declare auditable coverage scopes: unit = projects/todo-reference/src/domain/**/*.ts and projects/todo-reference/src/application/**/*.ts (excluding only documented generated/ambient files); integration = projects/todo-reference/src/infrastructure/**/*.ts plus Server Action modules under projects/todo-reference/src/app/**/actions.ts. Provide Docker Compose (or CI job definitions) so integration tests and E2E run only in isolated containers; document SQLITE_PATH and base URL for E2E; add npm scripts for unit, integration (container), coverage reports, and e2e.
acceptance: Coverage configuration enforces 100% line coverage for the declared unit scope and fails CI below that threshold.
Coverage configuration enforces 100% line coverage for the declared integration scope when collected from the containerized integration job.
Integration test execution is documented and wired to run only inside isolated containers per testing skill (compose services or equivalent CI matrix).
E2E (Playwright or repo-standard Chromium driver) has a documented command targeting the app served from the compose stack with a stable base URL.
Documented exclusions from coverage (if any) are listed with rationale and mirrored in quality-gate acceptance or architecture brief.
projects/todo-reference/e2e/ (or equivalent) exists as the home for Chromium tests with seed/reset strategy documented.
implementation_notes: QA retry 2026-04-19: align root .github/workflows/ci.yml with projects/todo-reference test:unit:coverage + integration/E2E paths per quality-gate.
